name: Herbed Chevre, Fontina and Prosciutto Pizza
recipeIngredient: Whole wheat pizza dough (recipe); or basic dough
1 tablespoon olive oil; plus additional for pan
4 ounces chevre in herbed oil; drain and reserve the oil
1 tomato, ripe, seeded, cut into half-inch dice (about 3/4 cup)
1 ounce prosciutto, thinly sliced, each slice cut into three pieces
recipeInstructions:
Note: Chevre in Herbed Oil is available in bulk in some specialty food stores. If unavailable, plain chevre can be substituted.
Increase the amount of herbs in the recipe to taste, and drizzle 2 tablespoons olive oil over pizza in Step 4.
1. Prepare Whole Wheat Pizza Dough through Step 3.
2. Heat oven to 500°F. Oil a 12-inch pizza pan as necessary for type of pan (see note in Five Cheese Pizza about types of pans); sprinkle with cornmeal if desired.
3. Complete Whole Wheat Pizza Dough.
4. Place dough in prepared pan; brush surface with 1 tablespoon olive oil. Scatter chevre, tomato, onion and prosciutto over dough, leaving a 3/4-inch border; sprinkle with marjoram, rosemary and salt and pepper to taste. Sprinkle Fontina over herbs; drizzle 2 tablespoons of the reserved herbed oil over all. Bake until crust is golden brown, 15 to 18 minutes.
Serve immediately. Makes One 12-inch Pizza.
